text: Being here, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and contemplation. The world outside the glass is calm, almost clinical, but inside, colors and ideas vibrate with potential. The text on the wall invites me to linger and reflect. I sense an atmosphere of inquiry—R&D, Research and Development—urging me to engage both as observer and participant in the unfolding dance of thought and innovation. I am quietly excited, as if on the threshold of new understanding.
